author: lOrm
content: #654 closed. Added PluginMcpRegistry in src/services/mcp_registry.rs and wired into ServiceRegistry (src/services/mod.rs). On wire_plugin_mcp_servers() the registry collects every plugin's mcp_configs into per-plugin McpRegistration vectors so subsequent reload-of-one-plugin doesn't drop the others. plugin_mcp_registrations() exposes the flat view for /mcp list. McpServerSpec mirrors the manifest's McpServerConfig in a transport-neutral form so consumers don't need to take a plugin-layer dep. 4 unit tests cover replace_plugin idempotency, per-plugin atomicity, remove_plugin scope, and spec round-trip.
